ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "managed_by" TEXT /* Name of the managing platform (e.g., Intune) */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Ownership type (e.g., Corporate, Personal, Unknown) */,
  "compliance" TEXT /* Compliance status of the device */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "last_check_in" TEXT /* Date and time of the last check-in */,
  "primary_user_upn" TEXT /* User Principal Name of the primary user of the device */,
  "hardware_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "last_software_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last software update */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the device was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the device's warranty expires */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the device */,
  "os_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to os_types table for the OS type */,
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to ownership_types table for the ownership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_os_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_type_id") REFERENCES os_types ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_ownership_id FOREIGN KEY ("ownership_id") REFERENCES ownership_types ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_primary_user_upn FOREIGN KEY ("primary_user_upn") REFERENCES users ("user_upn")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_upn" TEXT /* User Principal Name of the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the user */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the check was performed */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes regarding the compliance check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., Security, Software, Hardware) */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who performed the check */,
  "check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the compliance check (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the manager is responsible for */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "os_types" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  "latest_version" TEXT /* Latest version of the operating system */,
  "support_end_date" TEXT /* Date when support for the OS ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_types" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for ownership type */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., Corporate, Personal, Unknown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ownership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., Added, Updated, Deleted) */,
  "entity_id" TEXT /* ID of the device or user involved in the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Device, User) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., Device, User) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_in_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check-in history record */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device that checked in */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the check-in */,
  "check_in_location" TEXT /* Location where the check-in occurred */,
  "check_in_method" TEXT /* Method of check-in (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_in_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
